library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: Two fragments of a legal document in Judaeo-Arabic. Settlement of a business dispute. Ṣedaqa b. Shelomo (together with his father Shelomo b. Saʿadya) acknowledges that he has received 5 dinars from Ṣāliḥ b. David ha-Kohen and that he is only owed 5 more dinars, which will be paid over a period of 4 months (Nisan through Tammuz, the year is lost), 1.25 dinars each month. Join: Alan Elbaum.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
